sql_array: CREATE TABLE timestamps (id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO timestamps (id, event_time) VALUES (1, timestamp '2021-08-03 11:59:44.123456');
UPDATE timestamps SET event_time = timestamp '2021-08-04 10:00:00' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, epoch_ns(event_time) AS event_ns FROM timestamps;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM timestamps WHERE epoch_ns(event_time) > 1627990784123456000;
